creator: maxim.konovalov@gmail.com
text:
Hello,

[...]
> I'm trying to use the rc variable:
> | jail_name_flags="-l -u root"
>
> But after upgrading my system from 9.0 to 9.1 I can't start any jail which is using this flag.
>
That was already fixed by r237697 in head and stable/9.

The patch is quite small and could by applied by hands:

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/src/usr.sbin/jail/jail.c.diff?r1=1.39;r2=1.40

-- 
Maxim Konovalov
